discovery_confirm.title: Netgear PoE Switch
discovery_confirm.description: Set up {name} ({model}) at {host}. Enter the switch's admin password to finish.

data_description.password: Admin password for the switch web interface
data_description.community: Read community for port link sensors (leave blank to skip)
data_description.trap_mode: How instant link/PoE trap events reach Home Assistant: 'local' listens on UDP 162 on this host, 'mqtt' consumes an snmptrap2mqtt bridge over MQTT, 'disabled' relies on polling only
data_description.trap_bridge_host: IP of the host running snmptrap2mqtt; registered on the switch as the trap destination when the trap source is 'mqtt'

data_description.host: Hostname or IP address of the switch

data_description.trap_mode: How instant link/PoE trap events reach Home Assistant: 'local' listens on UDP 162 on this host, 'mqtt' consumes an snmptrap2mqtt bridge over MQTT, 'disabled' relies on polling only
data_description.trap_bridge_host: IP of the host running snmptrap2mqtt; registered on the switch as the trap destination when the trap source is 'mqtt'

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Netgear PoE Switch
reauth_confirm.description: The switch rejected the password. Please update it.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the switch web interface

abort.unique_id_mismatch: The host does not match the configured switch

set_port_failed.message: Failed to set PoE state on port {port} of {host}: {error}

power_cycle_failed.message: Failed to power cycle port {port} of {host}: {error}

set_port_name_failed.message: Failed to set the name of port {port} of {host}: {error}

set_port_name.name: Set port name
set_port_name.description: Sets the description of a switch port, shown as the port's name.

name.name: Name
name.description: New port description. An empty string clears it.
